raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr ar teem Augteem
tas ta buhs / ka juhs to prektu
Teesu Waraüm dohdat/ un tfchet-
ras Daltkas juus peederrehs / to
Tihrunu apfeht / un jums par
Ehdeenn / un teem / kas juhu
Namnã irr/un par Ehdeenu juh-
fu Behrnieeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija : Tu efi
muhs dshwus isglahbis/lai mehs
Schehlastibu atrohdam fawa
Kunga Azzis / un mehs buhſim
Waraüs Kalpt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad eechele Jahsepß to par
weenu Teesu/ lihds khat Deenai
pahr to Egipteku Tihrunu / ka
Waraüm ta peekta Teesa pee-
nahktu/ tikkai/ ka to Preesteru
Tihruns ween Waraüs ne ktüa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Israëls mitte Egiptes-
Seimmê eeksch Gosena Seines /
un tee usturrejahs eeksch tahs /
un auge/ un wairojahs fohti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jehkabs dsihwoja E-
giptes-Seimmê feptinpadeſmits
Gaddus/ un Jehkaba Dsihwiba
bija ſunts tschetrdefmits un fepti-
xti Gaddi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Israëta Deenas
tuwu nahze/ ka tam bij mirt/ tad
fanze wiꞥſch fawu Dehlu Jahse-
pu / un fazzija us to: Ja es /
lukdsams / tawa Breekfcha
Schehlastibu atraddis efimu/ tad
feez jelle tawu Rohku appakſch
mannas Jifkas/ un darri pee man
Schehlastibu un Pateetibu / ne
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es gribbu gul
manneem Tehweem / ta
tew mann no Egiptes ism
mann winno Rappös apr
tas fazzija : Es darrisch
tawu Wahrdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija winſ
ſwehrees prett mann /
ſwehreja winnam / un
lohzijahs pee tahs Gultas
Gallu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N pehz schahin L
tappe Jahsepam
zihts : Redst /
Teḥws irr neweffels / tad
tas fawus divi Dehlus/
ju un Eewräimu pee fen
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jehkabam tap-
dinahts / un fazzihts:
taws Dehls Jahseps nah
wis/ tad Rehmahs Israële
ká/ un apfehdahs us Gul
to fazzija Jehkabs us Ja
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas wiſnuwa
STIPRAJS DEE-
mann rahdijees Lufá K
Senunê/ un tre mann fn
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch irr ns m
zijis: Redsf/es likſchu te-
totes/un wairoſchu few/
chu tew par weenn Pańs-
ku/ un dohſchu fcho Sen
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
